title: Fix concurrent Tickflow run-record persistence
description: Parallel worktree run weo failed immediately with ENOENT renaming .tick/logs/pi-runner/runs/<run>.json.tmp. Multiple agents persisted the same run record concurrently using the same temp path. Use unique temp files and/or serialization so >3 parallel agents can update one run record safely.
acceptance_criteria: Parallel run-record persists do not share a fixed .tmp path; go test ./... passes
closed_reason: Fixed persistRunRecord to serialize writes per run record and use unique temporary paths; go test ./... passes
